message:
fix(tui): fix checkpoint dashboard integration bugs

- Clear stale data on checkpoint fetch error
- Simplify renderCheckpointBadge logic
- Add initial checkpoint fetch in Init()
- Set fetchingCheckpoint flag in New() to prevent duplicate fetches
- Initialize lastCheckpointFetch timestamp
